requirement_topic.en: NEC Article 625 — EV Power Transfer System Installation
requirement_topic.zh: NEC 第625条 — 电动汽车电力传输系统安装
requirement_topic.zht: NEC 第625條 — 電動汽車電力傳輸系統安裝

summary.en: NFPA 70 (National Electrical Code) Article 625 governs the installation of electric vehicle power transfer systems in the United States, covering EV supply equipment (EVSE), branch circuits, wiring methods, ventilation, and disconnecting means for Level 1, Level 2, and DC fast charging. All EVSE must be listed equipment (certified by a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory, NRTL, such as UL or ETL). Installation requires a permit and passes inspection by the local Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ). GFCI (ground-fault circuit-interrupter) protection is required for personnel safety. NEC 625.54 mandates GFCI protection for EVSE in certain applications.
summary.zh: NFPA 70（美国国家电气规范）第625条规范了美国电动汽车电力传输系统的安装，涵盖电动汽车供电设备（EVSE）、支路电路、布线方式、通风及断路装置，适用于一级、二级和直流快速充电。所有EVSE必须为经认证的设备（由美国国家认可测试实验室NRTL认证，如UL或ETL）。安装需取得许可，并通过地方有权机构（AHJ）的检查。须配置GFCI（接地故障断路器）保护以确保人员安全。NEC 625.54在特定应用场景下要求为EVSE提供GFCI保护。
summary.zht: NFPA 70（美國國家電氣規範）第625條規範了美國電動汽車電力傳輸系統的安裝，涵蓋電動汽車供電設備（EVSE）、支路電路、佈線方式、通風及斷路裝置，適用於一級、二級和直流快速充電。所有EVSE必須為經認證的設備（由美國國家認可測試實驗室NRTL認證，如UL或ETL）。安裝需取得許可，並通過地方有權機構（AHJ）的檢查。須配置GFCI（接地故障斷路器）保護以確保人員安全。NEC 625.54在特定應用場景下要求為EVSE提供GFCI保護。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 70 (NEC) 2023 — Article 625 Electric Vehicle Power Transfer System
UL 2594 — Standard for Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment
UL 2231 — Personnel Protection Systems for EV Supply Circuits

summary.en: [UNVERIFIED] China's primary standards for EV charging installation are GB/T 18487.1 (electric vehicle conductive charging system — general requirements) and GB 50966 (code for design of electric vehicle charging station). These cover general electrical safety and charging interface requirements but do not replicate the prescriptive installation rules, listed-equipment mandate, or AHJ permit-and-inspection process of NEC Article 625. Chinese EV charger certification follows CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) schemes; CQC certification does not constitute NRTL listing and carries no presumption of NEC 625 compliance.
summary.zh: [未经核实] 中国电动汽车充电安装的主要标准为GB/T 18487.1（电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求）和GB 50966（电动汽车充电站设计规范）。这些标准涵盖一般电气安全和充电接口要求，但不包含NEC第625条的规范性安装规则、经认证设备要求或AHJ许可检查程序。中国电动汽车充电桩认证遵循CQC（中国质量认证中心）体系；CQC认证不构成NRTL认证，且不能推定符合NEC 625。
summary.zht: [未經核實] 中國電動汽車充電安裝的主要標準為GB/T 18487.1（電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求）和GB 50966（電動汽車充電站設計規範）。這些標準涵蓋一般電氣安全和充電接口要求，但不包含NEC第625條的規範性安裝規則、經認證設備要求或AHJ許可檢查程序。中國電動汽車充電樁認證遵循CQC（中國質量認證中心）體系；CQC認證不構成NRTL認證，且不能推定符合NEC 625。

gap.en: NEC Article 625 requires EVSE to be listed by an NRTL (e.g., UL 2594) — a certification absent from standard Chinese-market EV chargers certified only to CQC or GB/T schemes. The AHJ permit-and-inspection process is a regulatory mechanism with no direct equivalent in Chinese EV charger installation practice. GFCI personnel protection (NEC 625.54) and dedicated branch circuit sizing (NEC 625.40) rules impose hardware and wiring requirements not present in Chinese standards. Without NRTL listing, a Chinese EV charger cannot legally obtain an electrical permit or pass inspection in the US.
gap.zh: NEC第625条要求EVSE须经NRTL认证（如UL 2594）——这是仅依据CQC或GB/T体系认证的中国市场电动汽车充电桩所缺乏的认证。AHJ许可检查程序是中国电动汽车充电桩安装实践中没有直接对应的监管机制。GFCI人员保护（NEC 625.54）和专用支路电路容量规定（NEC 625.40）提出了中国标准中不存在的硬件和布线要求。若缺乏NRTL认证，中国电动汽车充电桩在美国将无法合法取得电气许可或通过检查。
gap.zht: NEC第625條要求EVSE須經NRTL認證（如UL 2594）——這是僅依據CQC或GB/T體系認證的中國市場電動汽車充電樁所缺乏的認證。AHJ許可檢查程序是中國電動汽車充電樁安裝實踐中沒有直接對應的監管機制。GFCI人員保護（NEC 625.54）和專用支路電路容量規定（NEC 625.40）提出了中國標準中不存在的硬件和佈線要求。若缺乏NRTL認證，中國電動汽車充電樁在美國將無法合法取得電氣許可或通過檢查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — enforced by AHJ electrical permit and inspection for all EVSE installations in NEC-adopting US jurisdictions; listed equipment required
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent — GB/T 18487.1 and GB 50966 apply but have different scope and no equivalent AHJ permit-inspection enforcement mechanism

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese-market EV chargers certified only to GB/T or CQC standards are not presumed to comply with NEC Article 625. US market installation requires NRTL listing (e.g., UL 2594 for the charger unit) and installation by a licensed electrician following NEC 625 wiring rules and local AHJ permit requirements. Verify current NRTL listing status via the UL Product iQ database (iq.ul.com) or the applicable NRTL directory before installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T或CQC标准认证的中国市场电动汽车充电桩不能推定符合NEC第625条。在美国安装须取得NRTL认证（如充电桩单元的UL 2594认证），并由持证电工按照NEC 625布线规则及地方AHJ许可要求进行安装。安装前请通过UL Product iQ数据库（iq.ul.com）或相关NRTL目录核实当前NRTL认证状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T或CQC標準認證的中國市場電動汽車充電樁不能推定符合NEC第625條。在美國安裝須取得NRTL認證（如充電樁單元的UL 2594認證），並由持證電工按照NEC 625佈線規則及地方AHJ許可要求進行安裝。安裝前請通過UL Product iQ數據庫（iq.ul.com）或相關NRTL目錄核實當前NRTL認證狀態。

requirement_topic.en: NEC Article 625 — Listed Equipment Requirement and NRTL Certification
requirement_topic.zh: NEC 第625条 — 经认证设备要求及NRTL认证
requirement_topic.zht: NEC 第625條 — 經認證設備要求及NRTL認證

summary.en: NEC Article 625.2 and 625.5 require that all EVSE be listed (i.e., certified by a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory, NRTL) before installation in the US. The primary product standard is UL 2594 (Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment), which covers Level 1 and Level 2 EVSE. DC fast chargers are covered under UL 2202 (Electric Vehicle (EV) Charging System Equipment). NRTL listing is a prerequisite for AHJ permit approval — an AHJ will not issue an electrical permit for unlisted EVSE. Listed status is verified via the NRTL's public product directory (e.g., UL Product iQ at iq.ul.com).
summary.zh: NEC第625.2条和625.5条要求所有EVSE在美国安装前须为经认证的设备（即由美国国家认可测试实验室NRTL认证）。主要产品标准为UL 2594（电动汽车供电设备），涵盖一级和二级EVSE；直流快速充电桩适用UL 2202（电动汽车充电系统设备）。NRTL认证是AHJ许可审批的前提条件——AHJ不会为未经认证的EVSE签发电气许可。认证状态通过NRTL公开产品目录核实（如UL Product iQ，网址iq.ul.com）。
summary.zht: NEC第625.2條和625.5條要求所有EVSE在美國安裝前須為經認證的設備（即由美國國家認可測試實驗室NRTL認證）。主要產品標準為UL 2594（電動汽車供電設備），涵蓋一級和二級EVSE；直流快速充電樁適用UL 2202（電動汽車充電系統設備）。NRTL認證是AHJ許可審批的前提條件——AHJ不會為未經認證的EVSE簽發電氣許可。認證狀態通過NRTL公開產品目錄核實（如UL Product iQ，網址iq.ul.com）。

standards_or_laws: UL 2594 — Standard for Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment
UL 2202 — Standard for Electric Vehicle (EV) Charging System Equipment (DC fast charge)
29 CFR 1910.7 — OSHA NRTL Program (defines NRTL recognition)

summary.en: [UNVERIFIED] China requires EV charger certification under CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) schemes aligned to GB/T 18487 and related standards. CQC certification is issued by Chinese conformity assessment bodies and is recognised for the Chinese domestic market. It is not recognised by US AHJs and does not substitute for NRTL listing under NEC Article 625. Some Chinese manufacturers have pursued dual certification (CQC + UL 2594) specifically for US export; this is voluntary and not yet industry-standard practice.
summary.zh: [未经核实] 中国要求电动汽车充电桩按照与GB/T 18487及相关标准对应的CQC（中国质量认证中心）体系进行认证。CQC认证由中国合格评定机构颁发，在中国国内市场获得认可。该认证不被美国AHJ认可，也不能替代NEC第625条要求的NRTL认证。部分中国制造商已针对美国出口专门申请双重认证（CQC + UL 2594），但这属于自愿行为，尚非行业标准做法。
summary.zht: [未經核實] 中國要求電動汽車充電樁按照與GB/T 18487及相關標準對應的CQC（中國質量認證中心）體系進行認證。CQC認證由中國合格評定機構頒發，在中國國內市場獲得認可。該認證不被美國AHJ認可，也不能替代NEC第625條要求的NRTL認證。部分中國製造商已針對美國出口專門申請雙重認證（CQC + UL 2594），但這屬於自願行為，尚非行業標準做法。

gap.en: CQC certification and GB/T conformance carry no recognition under the US AHJ permit system. NEC Article 625.5 requires NRTL listing as a condition for lawful installation — this is a hard gate, not a checklist item. Chinese EV charger OEMs without UL 2594 or UL 2202 NRTL listing cannot obtain US electrical permits and cannot legally be installed in commercial or residential settings. Obtaining NRTL listing requires engaging a recognised testing lab (UL, ETL/Intertek, MET Labs, etc.), testing to the applicable UL product standard, and maintaining a follow-up service programme. The process typically takes 3–12 months and requires product samples and engineering documentation.
gap.zh: CQC认证和GB/T符合性在美国AHJ许可体系中不被认可。NEC第625.5条将NRTL认证作为合法安装的条件——这是硬性门槛，而非清单项目。没有UL 2594或UL 2202 NRTL认证的中国电动汽车充电桩OEM无法取得美国电气许可，也不能在商业或住宅场所合法安装。获得NRTL认证需要委托认可测试实验室（UL、ETL/Intertek、MET Labs等），按适用的UL产品标准进行测试，并维持后续服务计划。该过程通常需要3至12个月，并需要提供产品样品和工程文件。
gap.zht: CQC認證和GB/T符合性在美國AHJ許可體系中不被認可。NEC第625.5條將NRTL認證作為合法安裝的條件——這是硬性門檻，而非清單項目。沒有UL 2594或UL 2202 NRTL認證的中國電動汽車充電樁OEM無法取得美國電氣許可，也不能在商業或住宅場所合法安裝。獲得NRTL認證需要委託認可測試實驗室（UL、ETL/Intertek、MET Labs等），按適用的UL產品標準進行測試，並維持後續服務計劃。該過程通常需要3至12個月，並需要提供產品樣品和工程文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NEC 625.5 requires listed equipment; AHJ will not issue permit for unlisted EVSE; enforced at inspection in all NEC-adopting US jurisdictions
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — CQC certification is required for Chinese domestic market sale but has no equivalence to US NRTL listing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese-market EV chargers bearing only CQC certification cannot be legally installed in permitted US electrical installations under NEC Article 625. NRTL listing to UL 2594 (Level 1/2 EVSE) or UL 2202 (DC fast charge) is a non-negotiable prerequisite for US market entry. Verify listing status at iq.ul.com or the relevant NRTL directory. Confirm AHJ-specific requirements with the local building or electrical department before installation, as some jurisdictions impose additional conditions beyond NEC baseline.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有CQC认证的中国市场电动汽车充电桩不能在NEC第625条下合法安装于美国已获许可的电气安装项目中。UL 2594（一/二级EVSE）或UL 2202（直流快速充电）的NRTL认证是进入美国市场的不可或缺的前提条件。请通过iq.ul.com或相关NRTL目录核实认证状态。安装前请向地方建筑或电气部门确认AHJ特定要求，因为部分司法管辖区在NEC基线之外还有额外条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有CQC認證的中國市場電動汽車充電樁不能在NEC第625條下合法安裝於美國已獲許可的電氣安裝項目中。UL 2594（一/二級EVSE）或UL 2202（直流快速充電）的NRTL認證是進入美國市場不可或缺的前提條件。請通過iq.ul.com或相關NRTL目錄核實認證狀態。安裝前請向地方建築或電氣部門確認AHJ特定要求，因為部分司法管轄區在NEC基線之外還有額外條件。
